AU_TEXTSCHEMA.AU_ENRICHED_JSON: [ { "xpath": "/Root/Record/@recordNumber", "type": "string", "business_context": "Required record identifier for each Record in the file (source record number).", "metadata": { "required": true, "unique": true, "max_length": null, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "1", "0001", "rec-12345" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/CoverageCode", "type": "string", "business_context": "Benefit or coverage plan code associated with the employee.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": null, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "AWQ" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/EffectiveDate", "type": "date", "business_context": "Date when the record/coverage becomes effective.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": null, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "date", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "2023-01-01" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/EmployeeAddress1", "type": "string", "business_context": "Primary street address line for the employee.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": null, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "123 Main St" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/EmployeeAddress2", "type": "string", "business_context": "Secondary address line (apartment, suite) for the employee.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": null, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "Apt 4B" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/EmployeeCity", "type": "string", "business_context": "City for the employee's address.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": null, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "San Francisco" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/EmployeeState", "type": "string", "business_context": "State or province code for the employee's address (US 2-letter code typical).", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": 2, "pattern": "^[A-Z]{2}$", "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "CA", "NY" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/FirstName", "type": "string", "business_context": "Employee given (first) name.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": null, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "John" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/HireDate", "type": "date", "business_context": "Employee hire or start date.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": null, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "date", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "2020-06-15" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/LastName", "type": "string", "business_context": "Employee family (last) name.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": null, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "Doe" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/ZipCode", "type": "string", "business_context": "Postal (ZIP) code for the employee address (US 5- or 9-digit format typical).", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": 10, "pattern": "^\\d{5}(-\\d{4})?$", "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "94105", "94105-1234" ] } } ]
AU_TEXTSCHEMA.au_xsd: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xs:schema xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="Root"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <XSDVersion>1</XSDVersion> <fieldSeparator>,</fieldSeparator> <recordSeparator>\n</recordSeparator> <allowDiscontinousOrder>false</allowDiscontinousOrder> <allowIgnoreCase>false</allowIgnoreCase> <allowMoreFields>false</allowMoreFields> <allowLessFields>false</allowLessFields> <removeLastNewLineSeperator>false</removeLastNewLineSeperator> <removeInvalidChar>false</removeInvalidChar> <enclosedChar></enclosedChar> <startRowNumber>1</startRowNumber> <skippedBottomRows>0</skippedBottomRows> <arrayLayout>false</arrayLayout> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Record" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:complexType><xs:sequence> <xs:element name="EmployeeAddress1" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]Employee+Address+1[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="EmployeeAddress2" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]Employee+Address+2[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="EmployeeCity" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]Employee+City[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="EmployeeState" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]Employee+State[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="ZipCode" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]Zip+Code[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="CoverageCode" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]Coverage+Code[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="EffectiveDate" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]Effective+Date[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="HireDate" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]Hire+Date[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="FirstName" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]First+Name[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="LastName" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]Last+Name[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="recordNumber" type="xs:string" use="required"/> </xs:complexType></xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>
